scripts.audit: npm exec tsc -- --noEmit && npm run validate:skill && npm run audit:links && npm run check:source-registry && npm run check:agent-entrypoints && npm run check:workflow-adherence && npm run check:autopilot && npm run launchbench && npm run validate:launch-state -- --root templates --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml && npm run check:ux-patterns -- --root templates --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml && npm run check:11-star -- --root templates --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml && npm run check:security -- --root templates --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml && npm run check:content-assets -- --root templates --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml && npm run check:viral-growth -- --root templates --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml && npm run check:orchestration -- --root templates --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml && npm run render:launch-cockpit -- --root templates --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml --out /tmp/b2c-launch-cockpit.html
